text: A beginner's guide to Solana

text: What is a crypto wallet?

classification.rationale: Four-word heading only. Impossible to read inner attitude, aspect, stress, or tempo from this fragment alone.

text: What are stablecoins?

classification.rationale: Three-word heading only. Too short to read any placement.

text: Stablecoins are relatively stable cryptocurrencies that work by pegging their value 1:1 to other assets like fiat currencies, gold, or other cryptoassets.

text: Common crypto scams and how to avoid them

classification.rationale: A bare headline — too short and purely titular to read an inner attitude, aspect, stress, or motor. It gestures toward an Awake orientation (alert, threat-sensing) but there is not enough prose to confirm.

text: With the increasing number of tokens, apps, and airdrops, there's also a rise in scams aiming to steal them. It appears that almost every other day, there's a new story of someone being fooled into believing they've won a prize or used a legitimate app, only to discover they were on a malicious site and signed a transaction that emptied their wallet's funds.

classification.rationale: This passage scans the threat landscape ('almost every other day, there's a new story') with alert, flexible orientation — it is noticing and mapping multiple vectors of danger. The inner attitude reads Awake (Space+Time): strategic sensor, threat-cataloguing. Aspect is circumscribing (Time-led) — the prose wraps around recurring, accumulating incidents. Stress is space (flexible): the scanning is multi-directional, not urgency-spiked. Tempo is Doubting — a cautious, suspicious register that names uncertainty and recurring deception. Motor wringing→slashing (Strong-Flexible): carved-answer force landing on the hard reality of wallet-draining. A transient Acute flash occurs in the precise enumeration of the attack sequence ('signed a transaction that emptied their wallet's funds').
classification.literary_anchor: The investigative journalist mapping a crime pattern — Stieg Larsson's Lisbeth noting systemic predation.

text: This scam promises you free tokens or NFTs to bait you into clicking a malicious link. Once you click the link, which is usually found in a spam NFT or fake ad, it directs you to a malicious website to connect your wallet or approve a transaction.

classification.rationale: The prose maps the scam mechanism step by step with precise, sequenced spatial logic: bait → click → redirect → connect/approve. This is Awake (Space+Time) — the alert strategist tracking each move in a chain. Aspect circumscribing (Time-led): the paragraph wraps the full attack sequence in time-ordered steps. Stress is space (direct): the orientation is laser-focused on the exact pathway. Tempo is Acute — sharp, single-point vigilance identifying the precise attack vector. Motor pressing→punching (Strong-Direct): force-landing of each step in the sequence.
classification.literary_anchor: A cyber-security analyst walking through an exploit chain — precise, zero-drift.

text: As web3 becomes more popular, it not only attracts new excited users, but scammers as well. These bad actors try to take advantage of you through an array of common crypto scams, such as fake giveaways and airdrops, spam NFTs, scams ads, and more.

text: How to create a new Phantom wallet

classification.rationale: A bare instructional headline — too short to read an inner attitude, aspect, or stress. Gestures toward Practical (Stable) or Commanding but there is no prose body to confirm.

text: Phantom is a self-custodial wallet, meaning only you have access to your funds. Phantom never stores your credentials or has access to your account.

classification.rationale: The prose stakes out a bounded, sovereign domain: 'only you have access,' 'Phantom never stores,' 'never has access.' This is Stable (Weight+Space) — a structurally settled, decision-taken position. Aspect is enclosing (Weight-led): the copy wraps the user inside a protected boundary, defining what is kept out. Stress is flow (bound): the emphasis is on held, continuous containment — bound flow, no yielding outward. Tempo is Self-Contained — the stable register that holds inward, defines its own perimeter. classification.literary_anchor: Aragorn at the gates: 'None shall pass who were not summoned.' Sovereign, contained, irrevocable.

text: You can also create a wallet by signing in with your Google or Apple account and setting a four-digit PIN. You will use your email and PIN to restore your wallet on a new device. Phantom never has access to your private keys or your funds.

classification.rationale: The prose walks the user through a procedural sequence (Google/Apple sign-in → PIN → restore on new device) in calm, step-by-step time. Inner is Stable (Weight+Space) — measured, functional, decisions already made for the user's convenience. Aspect is circumscribing (Time-led): the steps wrap around the temporal journey of setup and future restoration. Stress is time (sustained): the cadence is unhurried, methodical, no urgency. Tempo is Practical — functional how-to exposition. Motor gliding→dabbing (Light-Direct): warm-touch guidance. classification.literary_anchor: A patient, competent technician walking someone through a setup process, then sealing it with a guarantee.

text: Your wallet is secured by a 12-word Secret Recovery Phrase. Write it down and store it somewhere safe and offline. It's the only way to restore your wallet on a new device, and anyone who has it can access your funds. Phantom will never ask you for your recovery phrase.

Stress is time (quick): the imperative verbs land with sharp immediacy — act now, secure it now. Tempo is Commanding — the Stable ruler issuing non-negotiable directives.
